_comment: Post-buy concierge pairing PRIORS. Keyed by our checkout-catalog slug (the product just bought) -> ordered list of complementary product NAMES the concierge offers first. Glen-edited 2026-05-30 (mirrors remedymatch.com related products; auto-scrape is WAF-blocked). NOTE: many of these complements are NOT yet in products.json (the QBO checkout catalog), so the concierge resolves each name at runtime: in-catalog -> 'Add to order' (adds a line to the same unpaid invoice); else -> resolve the remedymatch.com URL via the specific-formulations Pinecone namespace -> 'Open on the store'; else mention by name only. The concierge is member-led and may go beyond this list.
